name: The Big Bang Theory
description: Sheldon, Leonard, and the Caltech physics crew

questions.q: Which actor plays theoretical physicist Sheldon Cooper?

source.notes: Won 4 Emmys for the role. Show ran 2007-2019.

questions.q: What is Leonard's surname on the show?

source.notes: Played by Johnny Galecki. Named after physicist Douglas Hofstadter.

questions.q: At which prestigious California university do the main characters work?

source.notes: California Institute of Technology in Pasadena. Real university.

questions.q: What is Howard Wolowitz's profession?

source.notes: Unlike the others, he only has a master's degree, which they often tease him about.

questions.q: Which scientific theory does Sheldon study for most of the series?

source.notes: He later abandons it for 'super asymmetry' in the final season.

questions.q: What affectionate term does Sheldon use for his grandmother?

source.notes: Played by Annie Potts in both 'The Big Bang Theory' and 'Young Sheldon.'

questions.q: Raj has a condition that prevents him from speaking to women without consuming what?

source.notes: Selective mutism. Eventually overcomes it in Season 6.

questions.q: Who is Sheldon's girlfriend (and eventual wife) — a neurobiologist they meet through a dating website?

source.notes: Played by Mayim Bialik, a neuroscientist in real life.

questions.q: Who marries Howard Wolowitz in the series?

source.notes: Played by Melissa Rauch. Microbiologist with a noticeably high-pitched voice.

questions.q: What is the name of the guy who runs the comic book store the guys frequent?

source.notes: Played by Kevin Sussman. Often depressed but befriends the group.

questions.q: What is the name of Penny's often-mentioned but rarely-seen ex-boyfriend from her early seasons?

source.original_a: Sheldon Cooper and Amy Farrah Fowler
source.notes: Kurt was the muscle-bound ex mentioned frequently in early seasons.

questions.q: Which Nobel Prize do Sheldon and Amy win in the series finale?

source.original_a: Sheldon Cooper and Amy Farrah Fowler
source.notes: For their work on 'super-asymmetry.' Show's final episode aired May 16, 2019.

questions.q: Who plays the aspiring actress/waitress Penny?

source.notes: Penny's surname is never revealed in the series. Later becomes a pharmaceutical rep.

questions.q: Which musical instrument does Raj play?

source.notes: Percussion instrument from India. He plays in the episode 'The Bat Jar Conjecture.'

questions.q: Sheldon and Leonard's apartment is located at which street number in Pasadena?

source.notes: 2311 N. Los Robles Ave, Apartment 4A. Often just referred to by 4A.

questions.q: Which Star Trek captain is Sheldon's clear favorite?

source.notes: Patrick Stewart (who plays Picard) appeared as himself. Sheldon also idolizes Spock.

questions.q: Howard once spent time at which space location, which he brags about constantly?

source.notes: Season 5 finale through Season 6 premiere. Sent up via Soyuz rocket.

questions.q: What is the title of the show's theme song, performed by the Canadian band Barenaked Ladies?

source.notes: Describes the 13.7 billion years from the Big Bang to now.

questions.q: What is the name of the prequel spin-off series about Sheldon's childhood?

source.notes: Aired 2017-2024 on CBS. Iain Armitage plays young Sheldon. Ran 7 seasons.

questions.q: Which Chinese takeout restaurant's menu do the guys order from almost every night in early seasons?

source.notes: audit-corrected 2026-05-09: replaced duplicate 'The Szechuan Palace' distractor with 'Hunan Palace'. Later switched to Siam Palace after a lemon-chicken betrayal.
